meta.title: Nozomi's SCADAguardian and Case Studies
meta.description:
Nozomi's presentation on the S4x18 Sponsor Stage begins with some background on the company and SCADAGuardian product. They go over the anomaly detection and asset inventory features.

The highlight of this session are the case studies that begin at 7:00. They go over how detection would help with Industroyer/Crashoverride. They go over the phases of the attack and the detection that was available had the owner/operator been monitoring their network with SCADAguardian.

They then go into case studies with actual named owner/operators.
